title: ✨YOUR BRIGHTEST YEAR YET! ✨Workshop Announcement
excerpt: Your plans, hopes and dreams matter. They are meaningful reminders of how you can craft a life you love. By creating space for your intentions, you begin the beautiful process of taking an idea and allowing for it to come…
body:
Your plans, hopes and dreams matter. They are meaningful reminders of how you can craft a life you love. By creating space for your intentions, you begin the beautiful process of taking an idea and allowing for it to come to fruition. Embrace what’s ahead and allow yourself to let go of any negativity and self doubt. Live in greater alignment with your passions and purpose. How can you shine your brightest?

One of the greatest gifts we can give ourselves is to embrace our creativity. As you probably know, I love traveling around the world to spread ideas, positivity, and a love for all things paper-related. Unfortunately, I haven’t figured out a way to be everywhere at once (still working on that one) and many of you have been asking for a way to connect and create together on a deeper level. I’m here to let you know that the next best thing is right around the corner. 

Your Brightest Year Yet is a brand new workshop that has been a year in the making! It’s filled to the brim with crafty know-how for the ultimate 2020 glow-up. Let me be your creative coach for the first 6 weeks of the new year to lay the foundation for you to shine your brightest. In the online workshop, you'll create a vibrant traveler’s notebook using tried-and-true tips, tricks, and techniques from the comfort of your own crafting space, coffee shop or anywhere with good light and WiFi.

Through December 10th, we are offering Early Bird Pricing. Come grab your spot!

Also - If you're one of the first 20 to sign up - you'll also receive a special personalized notebook in the mail! We will open up the classroom with a warm welcome on December 20th and then the first lesson launches Jan 1, 2020.

Hope you'll join in on the fun as we embark on a fruitful new decade!
